title: Quantum Control Waveform Design
description: Learn the art and science of designing control waveforms for high-fidelity quantum gates. From Gaussian pulses to DRAG corrections, explore the pulse shapes that minimize leakage, reduce gate errors, and enable fast quantum operations.
learningObjectives: Design Gaussian and derivative-based pulse shapes for single-qubit gates
Implement DRAG pulses to suppress leakage to non-computational states
Calculate optimal pulse parameters for given qubit characteristics
Apply spectral analysis to understand pulse bandwidth and frequency content
Optimize two-qubit gate pulses including flux pulses and cross-resonance drives
